title: Urugudhey Lyrics Veyil
stanzas:
Urugudhey marugudhey
Orey paarvaiyaale
Urugudhey marugudhey
Orey paarvaiyaale
Ulagamae sulaludhey
unnai paarthathaale

Hey
Ambuliyil nanaindhu
santhikkira pozhudhu
Anbu kathai pesi pesi
vidyuthu iravu

Aezhu kadal thaandi thaan
Aezhu malai thaandi thaan
En karuthe machchan
kitta odi varum manasu

Sami paarthu
kumbidum podhum
Nee than en nenjil irukka

Oora vittu engeyum
verarunthu nikkiren
Koodu thanthe kili penne
unnaale than vaazhuren

Kooru pattu selaithan
vaanga solli kekuren
Koodi vittu koodu paaya
kadhalale suthuren

Mai itte kanne unnai
Marantha irandhe poven

Urugudhey marugudhey
Orey paarvaiyaale
Urugudhey marugudhey
Orey paarvaiyaale
Ulagamae sulaludhey
unnai paarthathaale

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Urugudhey'?

'Urugudhey' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of seeing a loved one.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Veyil'?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Veyil, highlighting the emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Urugudhey'?

The song features the talented voices of Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Goshal.

Who composed the music for 'Urugudhey'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was 'Urugudhey' released?

'Urugudhey' was released on December 8, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Veyil, the song Urugudhey serves as a poignant reflection of love and yearning. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection. With its soothing melody and heartfelt performances by Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Goshal, the song beautifully conveys the essence of romantic longing. It resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Urugudhey from Veyil is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Goshal, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and melody. The enchanting composition by GV PrakashKumar elevates the listening experience, making it a must-hear for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: You are melting, you are changing, with just one glance. The whole world is spinning because of seeing you.
The precious gold melts and cries. The longing wears me down, the kiss continues.
I am blooming with joy, just a little while.
Hey... You are melting, you are changing, with just one glance. The whole world is spinning because of seeing you.
The precious gold melts and cries. The longing wears me down, the kiss continues.
I am blooming with joy, just a little while.
You are melting, you are changing, with just one glance. The whole world is spinning because of seeing you.
Hey, when I meet you in the light, love speaks and sparks fly at night.
Crossing seven seas, crossing seven mountains, my heart runs to you, my friend.
We live together in a gathering, looking at each other.
In every gathering, I am merging with love and moving forward.
When the tree bends down, you are the one in my heart.
You are melting, you are changing, with just one glance. The whole world is spinning because of seeing you.
I have left my place and am standing everywhere. I live only for you, my dear.
I am asking for the song to be sung, saying it out loud. Together we will wander in love, leaving our homes behind.
Will you ask God for mercy and bring you close to me?
Will you write your name on the thorny bush for me?
If I close my eyes, I will forget you and leave.
You are melting, you are changing, with just one glance. The whole world is spinning because of seeing you.
The precious gold melts and cries. The longing wears me down, the kiss continues.
I am blooming with joy, just a little while.
